sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79170" key="pareate/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρε-ᾱτέον</orth>, <sense id="n79170.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must pass by</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">over</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tz.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ad Hes.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.10</biblScope> </bibl> G.</sense> </entryFree>
